title: Model Config Inputs Manifest
description: Schema for .github/manifests/input.yml used by the PR workflow.

type.description: Target configuration type on the remote.

cold-storage.description: Whether to store on cold storage (for example tape).

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite existing target paths.

inputs.description: Map of absolute source path to target path relative to the remote inputs root.

propertyNames.description: Absolute source path accessible to the service user.

additionalProperties.description: Target path relative to the remote configurations input directory.
